title: Example Engineering College thesis formatting requirements

sourceDocuments.title: Example thesis format manual
sourceDocuments.notes: Fictional source used for template onboarding tests.

requirements.title: A4 paper and margins
requirements.description: Thesis pages use A4 paper with fixed top, bottom, left, and right margins.

requirements.title: Heading hierarchy and spacing
requirements.description: Heading levels 1 to 3 must use the college heading styles and numbering.

evidence.shortQuote: Chapter and subsection headings use numbered levels.

requirements.title: Cover metadata table
requirements.description: Cover page must render thesis title, author, student number, major, advisor, college, and date.

evidence.shortQuote: Cover contains required student and thesis fields.

requirements.normalizedValue: Cover field table populated from metadata and variables
requirements.notes: Implemented with page template layout DSL.

requirements.title: Three-line table rules
requirements.description: Academic tables can use top, header, and bottom horizontal rules without default vertical lines.

evidence.shortQuote: Tables use three horizontal rules where applicable.

requirements.notes: Mapped to table renderer and table-edge fixture.

requirements.title: Bibliography hanging indent
requirements.description: Bibliography entries use numbered list formatting with hanging indent.

evidence.shortQuote: References are numbered with hanging indent.

requirements.title: Optional legacy watermark
requirements.description: Older manual notes mention an optional watermark for draft copies.

mappings.notes: Implemented for three-line mode and advanced table fixtures.
Watermark rendering is outside current deterministic thesis template scope.

approval.notes: Fictional approved example for quality workflow tests.
